station_address: Dixant Bhavan, Adi Shankaracharya Marg, opposite IIT, BSNL Colony, Powai, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400076
text:
I visited the Indian Oil petrol pump near IIT Powai at around 11:10 PM because Google shows it as open 24 hours. However, the petrol pump was already closed. It actually operates from 6:00 AM to 11:00 PM.

This caused inconvenience and trouble for me, as I was relying on the information shown online. I request the management to update the correct operating hours on Google so that other customers do not face similar issues.

station_address: Dixant Bhavan, Adi Shankaracharya Marg, opposite IIT, BSNL Colony, Powai, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400076
text: It's the only Petrol pump on JVLR  from IIT Powai to seepz. It's located on the main road at IIT gate no -2 signal, this Petrol pump isn't's spacious there is less space so at peak time the vehicle in queue goes on main road and there is more traffic at the peak time. There is no space for car for to come inside so the car's are re fuled on road side. Staff is good. There is yes Bank ATM available at pump.

station_address: Dixant Bhavan, Adi Shankaracharya Marg, opposite IIT, BSNL Colony, Powai, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400076
text: There are 3 gas stations nearby and this farthest among 3. But I like filling here. It's usually less crowded probably because of the fast service and very convenient. Most importantly, not sure if anyone else has observed, the average just went up from 12.8 to 14 from the time I started filling here.

station_address: Dixant Bhavan, Adi Shankaracharya Marg, opposite IIT, BSNL Colony, Powai, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400076
text: The instruments are configured such that they dispense less oil than the one shown on the screen. Stay away. You can double check by filling petrol from any other pump. I'd recommend the Godrej petrol pump.
